title: acer paxii var. ningpoense
intro: Acer paxii var. ningpoense is a variant of the Acer paxii species, a type of maple tree native to China. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Acer paxii var. ningpoense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made by drying the bark and leaves, which can be decocted in hot water to create a tea that is consumed for its medicinal properties.
